master_row.title: Grav Hamiltonian
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Generalized Helicity Conservation] In the coupled electromagnetic-gravitational system with quantum corrections: \begin{equation} \frac{d}{dt}\left[\mathcal{H}_{\text{mag}} + \frac{\lambda_g}{\mu_0}\mathcal{H}_{\text{acoustic}} + \sum_{m=1}^{\infty}\frac{m}{R_{KK}}\mathcal{H}_m^{KK} + \mathcal{H}_{\text{grav}}\right] = 0 \end{equation} where gravitational helicity: \begin{equation} \mathcal{H}_{\text{grav}} = \int_{\Sigma} K_{ij}h^{ij}\sqrt{h} \, d^3x \end{equation} with $K_{ij}$ the extrinsic curvature and $h_{ij}$ the induced metric on spacelike slice $\Sigma$. \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Magnetic Helicity and Gravitational Memory’: ional sectors. where gravitational helicity
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `D:\00_Engine\CSV\emergent_curvature_theory.tex` for registry alignment and later derivation.
